case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JULIO ERNESTO ESCHEVERRIA MORENO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $624.43 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, JULIO ERNESTO ESCHEVERRIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JULIO ERNESTO ESCHEVERRIA MORENO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED MAR-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, JULIO ERNESTO ESCHEVERRIA

AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PROOF OF SERVICE AMENDED TO SHOW ALTERED DATES ON DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE. SERVED MAR-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, JULIO ERNESTO ESCHEVERRIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2019 - AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO JUN-28-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, JULIO ERNESTO ESCHEVERRIA $624.43 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $704.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
